---
title: "02: SET3vSET3 Comps"
params:                              
  experiment_id: S3vS3
  run_date: 2025-02-15
  author: "Shalise Burch"
output: html_document  
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: TRUE        
    warning: FALSE     
    message: FALSE     

---

##  --- Setup
```{r libraries and avariables, message=FALSE}
# LAST UPDATED: 
# 2025-09-18 SAB ------------------------------

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(here)


exp_name <- params$experiment_id
data_path <- here("rnaseq", "01_data")
results_path <- here("rnaseq", "02_results")
rdata_path <- here("rnaseq", "03_rdata")

source(here("rnaseq", "00_scripts", "ScatterPlotFunctions.R"))

head_dir <- file.path(results_path, "Scatterplots")
make_subdir(head_dir)

out_dir <- file.path(head_dir, "SET3vSET3")
make_subdir(out_dir)

```

# --- input data
# SAB01 - SET3 D3, D4, D6, D8, D10 - NT and 1uM RA
# SAB02 - SET3 (n=2/set) D3, D4, D5 - NT and 1uM RA
# SAB04 - SET3 D3, D5, D7 - NT and 1uM RA

 
 RUN:
1.  SAB01 v SAB02 - OVERLAP D3, D4 
2.  SAB01 v SAB04  -- OVERLAP D3 
3.  SAB02 v SAB04  - OVERLAP D3, D5
 
```{r load gene lists}
SAB01_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")
SAB02_SET3 <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB02/rnaseq/03_rdata/SET3/SAB02_SET3_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")
SAB04_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB04/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB04_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")

head(names(SAB01_all), 20)
head(names(SAB02_SET3), 20)
head(names(SAB04_all), 20)

my_contrasts <- c(
  "T21_CTRL_vs_D21_CTRL",
  "T21_RA_vs_D21_RA",
  "D21_RA_vs_D21_CTRL",
  "T21_RA_vs_T21_CTRL"
)
```

Helper functions to pull data needed for function
```{r helper functions}

# 1. Build the inner list key: "<GENO>_<DAY>_<TREAT>_vs_<GENO>_<DAY>_<TREAT>"
get_days_for_contrast <- function(all_list, contrast) {
  if (is.null(all_list[[contrast]])) return(character(0))
  nms <- names(all_list[[contrast]])
  # Extract day tokens that appear BETWEEN underscores, e.g., "_D3_"
  days <- unique(unlist(regmatches(nms, gregexpr("(?<=_)D\\d+(?=_)", nms, perl = TRUE))))
  days
}

has_pair <- function(all_list, contrast, inner_key) {
  !is.null(all_list[[contrast]]) && !is.null(all_list[[contrast]][[inner_key]])
} 

build_inner_key <- function(contrast, day) {
  sides <- strsplit(contrast, "_vs_", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  make_side <- function(side) {
    parts <- strsplit(side, "_", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    paste0(parts[1], "_", day, "_", paste(parts[-1], collapse = "_"))
  }
  paste0(make_side(sides[1]), "_vs_", make_side(sides[2]))
}

# 2. DESeq2 results table with required columns for function
prep_for_scatter <- function(x) {
  df <- as.data.frame(x)
  if (!"gene_id" %in% names(df)) df <- tibble::rownames_to_column(df, "gene_id")
  lfc_col <- dplyr::case_when(
    "log2FoldChange"     %in% names(df) ~ "log2FoldChange",
    "log2FC"             %in% names(df) ~ "log2FC",
    "log2FoldChange_raw" %in% names(df) ~ "log2FoldChange_raw",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  padj_col <- dplyr::case_when(
    "padj"   %in% names(df) ~ "padj",
    "qvalue" %in% names(df) ~ "qvalue",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  if (is.na(lfc_col))  stop("Missing log2FC column.")
  if (is.na(padj_col)) stop("Missing adjusted p-value column.")
  dplyr::transmute(df,
    gene_id = as.character(.data$gene_id),
    padj = as.numeric(.data[[padj_col]]),
    log2FoldChange = as.numeric(.data[[lfc_col]])
  )
}

# 3. Pull, prep, plot one (contrast × day) pair and save
run_scatter_pair_nested <- function(contrast, day,
                                    unfiltered_degs1, unfiltered_degs2,
                                    proj1_label = "deg1", proj2_label = "deg2",
                                    log_cut = 0.5, p_cut = 0.05,
                                    color_by = "DEG", autoprin = TRUE,
                                    out_dir = getwd()) {
  inner_key <- build_inner_key(contrast, day)

  ok1 <- has_pair(unfiltered_degs1, contrast, inner_key)
  ok2 <- has_pair(unfiltered_degs2, contrast, inner_key)
  if (!ok1 || !ok2) {
    message("Skipping ", contrast, " ", day, " (",
            if (!ok1) paste0("missing in ", proj1_label),
            if (!ok1 && !ok2) " & " else "",
            if (!ok2) paste0("missing in ", proj2_label), ").")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  df1 <- prep_for_scatter(unfiltered_degs1[[contrast]][[inner_key]])
  df2 <- prep_for_scatter(unfiltered_degs2[[contrast]][[inner_key]])

  var1 <- paste0(proj1_label, "_", day, "_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", contrast))
  var2 <- paste0(proj2_label, "_", day, "_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", contrast))
  assign(var1, df1, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign(var2, df2, envir = .GlobalEnv)

  md <- list()
  md[[var1]] <- paste0(proj1_label, " ", day, " (", gsub("_", " ", contrast), ")")
  md[[var2]] <- paste0(proj2_label, " ", day, " (", gsub("_", " ", contrast), ")")

  p <- plotScatterAnalysis(
    df1 = var1, df2 = var2,
    ColorBy = color_by, AutoPrint = autoprin,
    label_genes = character(0),
    logCutoff_vitro = log_cut, logCutoff_vivo = log_cut,
    pvalCutoff = p_cut, Metadata = md, ReturnDataOnly = FALSE
  )

  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  safe_ct <- gsub("_vs_", "-vs-", contrast, fixed = TRUE)
  fn <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(proj1_label, "_vs_", proj2_label, "_", safe_ct, "_", day, "_scatter.pdf"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(fn, p, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
  message("Saved: ", fn)
  invisible(p)
}

# 4) Batch runner: give it a vector of days and contrasts, it loops and plots
run_scatter_auto <- function(unfiltered_degs1, unfiltered_degs2,
                             contrasts = c("T21_CTRL_vs_D21_CTRL",
                                           "T21_RA_vs_D21_RA",
                                           "D21_RA_vs_D21_CTRL",
                                           "T21_RA_vs_T21_CTRL"),
                             proj1_label = "degs1", proj2_label = "deg2",
                             log_cut = 0.5, p_cut = 0.05,
                             color_by = "DEG", autoprin = TRUE,
                             out_dir = getwd()) {

  for (ct in contrasts) {
    days01 <- get_days_for_contrast(unfiltered_degs1, ct)
    days06 <- get_days_for_contrast(unfiltered_degs2, ct)
    overlap <- intersect(days01, days06)

    if (length(overlap) == 0) {
      message("No common days for ", ct, " — skipping.")
      next
    }

    message("Contrast ", ct, " → days: ", paste(overlap, collapse = ", "))
    for (dy in overlap) {
      run_scatter_pair_nested(
        contrast = ct, day = dy,
        unfiltered_degs1 = unfiltered_degs1, unfiltered_degs2 = unfiltered_degs2,
        proj1_label = proj1_label, proj2_label = proj2_label,
        log_cut = log_cut, p_cut = p_cut,
        color_by = color_by, autoprin = autoprin,
        out_dir = out_dir
      )
    }
  }
  invisible(TRUE)
}
```


# Scatterplot 
```{r}

run_scatter_auto(
  unfiltered_degs1 = SAB02_SET3,
  unfiltered_degs2 = SAB04_all,
  proj1_label= "SAB02",
  proj2_label = "SAB04_SET3",
  out_dir   = out_dir,
  log_cut   = 0.5,
  p_cut     = 0.05,
  color_by  = "DEG",
  autoprin  = TRUE
)
```
